summary: ZERO-TRUST 150-POINT QA VERIFICATION of Visionary Suite responsive mobile/tablet behavior - ALL 16 TEST CASES PASSED. Tested all pages at 320px (iPhone SE), 393px (iPhone 14), 768px (iPad), and 1920px (Desktop) viewports. No horizontal scrollbars, no header overlaps, modals viewport-safe, responsive grids working correctly, desktop layouts unchanged.

P0-1_horizontal_scroll.details: No horizontal scrollbar on ANY page at 320px, 393px, 768px widths

P0-2_header_overlap.details: No header element overlap (title vs bell vs credits vs avatar) at 320px and 393px

P0-4_modal_viewport_safety.details: Modals stay within viewport at 393px - tested upgrade modal 'You're on fire!'

P0-6_support_dock_hidden.details: Help/support dock hidden on /app/story-video-studio route at mobile widths

P0-8_content_overflow.details: No content overflow viewport width on any page at 320px (programmatic check: scrollWidth <= clientWidth)

P0-10_refresh_behavior.details: Refreshing Dashboard/Studio/Profile does not redirect to wrong page

P1-11_fluid_typography.details: Fluid typography readable at 320px - hero text at 36px, no crushed/overlapping text

P1-12_touch_targets.details: Touch targets minimum 44x44px on mobile - 100% pass rate (58 buttons checked)

P1-13_ios_input_zoom.details: iOS input zoom prevention - all inputs have font-size >= 16px at mobile widths

DESKTOP_REGRESSION.details: Landing, Dashboard, Studio, Billing at 1920px render identically to baseline - no layout changes, no missing elements, no broken styling

critical_code_review_comments: responsive.css implements 20 modules for universal mobile responsiveness - all working correctly
overflow-x: hidden on html/body prevents horizontal scroll globally
vs-pricing-grid uses proper breakpoints: 1-col at mobile, 2-col at 640px, 4-col at 1024px
vs-card-grid uses proper breakpoints: 1-col mobile, 2-col at 640px, 3-col at 1024px, 4-col at 1280px
Input font-size forced to 16px at mobile via responsive.css rule - prevents iOS zoom
Touch targets enforced via @media (pointer: coarse) rule - min 44x44px
Modal viewport safety via vs-modal-content class with max-width: calc(100vw - 24px)
Support dock correctly hidden on studio routes via ResponsiveSupportWrapper useLocation check
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZERO-TRUST re-verification complete. All 16 P0/P1 responsive test cases PASSED. Tested at 320px (iPhone SE), 393px (iPhone 14), 768px (iPad), 1920px (Desktop). Key findings: (1) No horizontal scroll on any page at any viewport, (2) Header elements don't overlap at mobile widths, (3) Modals stay within viewport, (4) Support dock hidden on studio route, (5) Refresh behavior correct, (6) Typography readable, (7) Touch targets >= 44px, (8) iOS input zoom prevented, (9) Card grids responsive, (10) Desktop layouts unchanged. Responsive CSS framework at /src/styles/responsive.css with 20 modules working correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no issues found. This was a mandatory re-verification ordered by client. Previous test (iteration_522) passed 15/15 and this zero-trust double-check confirms all responsive behaviors are working correctly.
